name: mashraf-marketplace
description: A collection of Claude Code plugins by Mostafa Ashraf.

plugins.name: ai-sdlc-harness
plugins.description: AI-driven SDLC workflow harness for multi-repo development. Provides story refinement, multi-agent development (plan → code → review → test → PR), and automated guardrails via hooks. Supports Azure DevOps, Jira, GitLab, GitHub, Zoho, and local Markdown as work item providers; ADO, GitLab, GitHub, gh-cli, and glab-cli as git providers. Language-agnostic, discovery-driven; supports any language (frontend + backend).
